channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [Mistral] unsloth
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 54,819 → 56,049 (+1,230)
Unified web UI for training and running open models like Qwen, DeepSeek, gpt-oss and Gemma locally.
Language: Python
Category: Mistral Stars: 56,049 | Forks: 4,696

item.title: [LLaMA] unsloth
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 54,818 → 56,048 (+1,230)
Unified web UI for training and running open models like Qwen, DeepSeek, gpt-oss and Gemma locally.
Language: Python
Category: LLaMA Stars: 56,048 | Forks: 4,696

item.title: [Claude] ui-ux-pro-max-skill
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 44,344 → 45,363 (+1,019)
An AI SKILL that provide design intelligence for building professional UI/UX multiple platforms
Language: Python
Category: Claude Stars: 45,363 | Forks: 4,362

item.title: [Claude] everything-claude-code
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 83,605 → 86,063 (+2,458)
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
Language: JavaScript
Category: Claude Stars: 86,063 | Forks: 11,260

item.title: [AI] openclaw
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 321,060 → 323,516 (+2,456)
Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
Language: TypeScript
Category: AI Stars: 323,516 | Forks: 62,348

item.title: [AGI] SuperAGI
item.description:
📉 Rank: #2 → #3 (↓1)
<⚡️> SuperAGI - A dev-first open source autonomous AI agent framework. Enabling developers to build, manage & run useful autonomous agents quickly and reliably.
Language: Python
Category: AGI Stars: 17,279 | Forks: 2,182

item.title: [AGI] screenpipe
item.description:
📈 Rank: #3 → #2 (↑1)
screenpipe turns your computer into a personal AI that knows everything you've done. record. search. automate. all local, all private, all yours.
Language: Rust
Category: AGI Stars: 17,282 | Forks: 1,463
